markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Haxe Game Development

A curated list of game development resources for Haxe 4, a high level strictly typed programming language which is used to produce cross-platform native code.

Feel free to update it.

Contents

  • Game engines
  • Physics
  • Architecture
  • Networking
  • Serialization and storage
  • Games
  • Miscellaneous
  • Articles
  • Other haxe lists

Game engines

Those are Haxe 4 compatible game engines.

Engine Target Description
Armory (Kha)stars2.1k Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles An open-source 3D game engine with full Blender integration.
Away3Dstars133 Web, Mobile, Desktop An open source, real-time 3D engine for OpenFL.
HaxeFlixel (OpenFL)stars1.4k Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles Free, cross-platform 2D game engine powered by OpenFL.
Haxegon (OpenFL)stars182 Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles A programming library for beginners. Powered by OpenFL and Starling.
Heapsstars2.1k Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles High Performance Game Framework.
hxdefoldstars120 Web, Mobile, Desktop Haxe/Lua externs for Defold game engine.
OpenFLstars1.6k Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles Interactive game and app development library.
Starlingstars208 Web, Mobile, Desktop The "Cross-Platform Game Engine", a popular Stage3D framework.
Stencyl (OpenFL)stars133 Web, Mobile, Desktop Create Flash, HTML5, iOS, Android, and desktop games with no code.
unreal.hxstars382 Web, Mobile, Desktop, Consoles Haxe Integration for Unreal.
Low-level Engine Target Description
Khastars1.2k Web, Mobile, Desktop, Console Ultra-portable, high performance, open source multimedia framework.
Limestars611 Web, Mobile, Desktop A flexible, lightweight layer for Haxe cross-platform developers.
linc_glfwstars9 Desktop GLFW binding (multi-platform library for OpenGL, OpenGL ES and Vulkan).
NMEstars439 Web, Mobile, Desktop A cross-platform native backend for Haxe projects.

Physics

Library Description
echostars102 Simple Physics Library.
haxebulletstars91 Bullet 3D Physics for Haxe.
nape-haxe4stars33 Physics Engine (the original Haxe3 version of nape can be found herestars540).

Architecture

IoC == Inversion of Control  
EC == Entity Component  
ECS == Entity-Component-System
FSM == Finite State Machine
MVC == Model View Controller
Library Architecture Description
awe6stars73 IoC, EC The inverted game framework, is a development tool focused on Future Proofing.
ecxstars49 ECS An Entity Component System framework.
hexMachinastars7 MVC A powerful multi-modular MVC framework.
OSISstars32 ECS Entity Component System architecture with networking support.

Networking

Library Description
Anettestars35 Simple network library (no UDP).
colyseus-hxstars56 Multiplayer Game Client.
haxe-simple-peer (js)stars4 Haxe externs for simple-peer.
hxWebSocketsstars49 Websockets for all Haxe platforms.
Built-in Heaps, OpenFL (HaxeFlixel & co), Kha (Armory).

Serialization and storage

Library Description
Bitsstars19 Binary bit flags with unlimited amount of bits.
CastleDBstars403 A structured static database easing collaboration.
hxbitstars122 A binary serialization and network synchronization library.
PODStreamstars19 Plain Old Data serializer.

RELEASED
Darksburg Desktop Heaps
Dead Cells Desktop, Consoles Heaps

Dicey Dungeons Desktop, Consoles Haxegon (OpenFL)

rymdkapsel Desktop, Mobile OpenFL

Miscellaneous

Type Library Description
Animation spine-hxstars48 Spine runtime for Haxe automatically converted from the official Java/libgdx runtime.
_ HaxeFlixel Spine parser.
_ Heaps-Spinestars13 Spine player for heaps.
_ heaps-asepritestars12 Load and render sprites and animations in Aseprite format.
_ openfl-asepritestars13 Load and render sprites and animations in Aseprite format.
_ asestars9 .ase/.aseprite file format loader written in Haxe without external dependencies.
Color manipulation nxColorstars35 Color manipulation library.
Collision differstars151 A separation axis theorem collision library.
Data structures polygonal-dsstars319 Data structures for games.
Editor flixel-studiostars61 In-game editor for HaxeFlixel.
Procedural generation Dungeon builderstars60 A set of dungeon generation algorithm (works w/ hx4 w/ minor changes).
Localization firetonguestars128 A translation/localization framework written in Haxe.
Map parser PyxelEdit Map Importerstars34 Parser for maps generated by the editor PyxelEdit.
_ Heaps Built-in parser for Tiled.
_ HaxeFlixel Parser for Tiled & Ogmo.
_ LEdstars34 2D level editor with a typed compile time loader.
Math helpers hxmathstars80 A game-oriented math library for the Haxe language.
_ haxe-glmstars44 A toolset for using 2, 3, and 4 dimensional vectors and matrices, as well as quaternions.
_ hx-vector2dstars10 Worlds most complete Vector2d / Point class. With operator overloading.
Modding polymodstars68 An atomic modding framework for Haxe games/apps.
Particles Sparklerstars14 Modular Particle System.
Monetization extension-iapstars7 Provides an access to in-app purchases (iOS) and in-app billing (Android) for OpenFL projects using a common API. Fork of thisstars68.
Pathfinding pathfinderstars20 Easy A* pathfinding algorithm.
Sprite haxe-asepritestars19 Parser for .ase and .aseprite files.
Steam SteamWrapstars75 Haxe native extension for the Steam API.
Texture Packer hxpkstars47 Port of the libGDX Texture Packer.
Tweening actuatestars134 A flexible, fast "tween" library.
_ YATLstars14 Yet Another (Haxe) Tweening Library.
UI domkitstars63 CSS Components based strictly typed UI framework.
_ flixel-uistars115 GUI library for HaxeFlixel.
_ HaxeUI UI library with multiple framework backends (HTML5, Kha, OpenFL, PixiJS, WxWidgets, and a number of others as works in progress)
